overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from a Harry Potter game (Hogwarts Legacy), walking through gothic castle corridors with stone arches and torch lighting. The player passes a student, sees a dragon skeleton, encounters a ghost, and navigates through staircases including a spiral descent into a lower level with blue-green lighting.

events.description: moving from entrance hall into narrow stone corridor
slowing as approaching the student in robes

agents.ego_description: walking through the castle entrance hall and corridors, approaching a student in robes

segments.scene_description: The segment begins in a grand entrance hall featuring a central suit of armor display and Hogwarts crest banner. The camera moves through stone corridors with crenellated walls, passing suits of armor and approaching a student in robes. A large dragon skeleton is visible on a platform to the left as the camera enters a wider chamber.

scene_state.functional_zone: long gothic corridor with repeating arches

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the long corridor with gothic arches

entered.detail: series of repeating gothic stone arches forming the corridor ceiling
iron chandeliers hanging from the ceiling with multiple candles

segments.scene_description: The camera proceeds down a long, empty corridor characterized by repeating gothic stone arches and hanging chandeliers. The warm torchlight illuminates the stone walls and floor tiles as the camera moves steadily forward through the medieval castle architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: side corridor with cauldrons and ghost encounter

events.description: turning right at the corridor intersection
translucent ghost appears floating in the corridor ahead

agents.ego_description: turning right at the corridor junction and walking toward a staircase, observing a ghostly figure

notable_agents.action: translucent ghost floating in the corridor ahead

entered.detail: stack of copper cauldrons beside a wooden door
stone staircase leading upward with wooden handrail

segments.scene_description: The camera turns right into a narrower corridor where stacked cauldrons sit beside a wooden door. A translucent ghost floats in the distance near a stone staircase. The lighting remains warm from wall-mounted torches as the camera approaches the stairs.

events.description: beginning to ascend the stone stairs
passing through iron gate into spiral staircase tower

agents.ego_description: climbing the stone stairs, passing through an iron gate, then descending a tight spiral staircase

entered.detail: rusted iron gate that opens to reveal the spiral staircase
narrow winding stone staircase descending in a tight spiral
wooden barrels stored in alcove under arch

segments.scene_description: The camera ascends a short flight of stone stairs, passes through a rusted iron gate into a circular tower, and begins descending a tight spiral staircase. The walls are rough-hewn stone, and the lighting becomes dimmer as the camera descends deeper into the castle structure.

scene_state.functional_zone: lower level corridor with blue-green lighting

events.description: exiting spiral staircase into lower corridor
abrupt shift from warm torchlight to cool blue-green ambient light

agents.ego_description: exiting the spiral stairs and walking through a lower corridor with distinctive blue-green lighting

entered.detail: underground corridor illuminated by blue-green magical light
ornate stone columns lining the corridor
circular blue light fixture on the ceiling

segments.scene_description: The camera exits the spiral staircase into a lower-level corridor dramatically lit with blue-green light. The atmosphere shifts from warm torchlight to cool magical illumination as the camera moves between ornate gothic columns toward a distant archway.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey through the grand, torch-lit halls of a gothic castle that eventually descends into a cool, magically illuminated lower level. It begins in a grand entrance hall featuring a suit of armor and a Hogwarts crest, moving past a student and a massive dragon skeleton as it enters a wider chamber. The camera then proceeds through a long corridor of repeating stone arches and chandeliers before turning into a narrower passage where stacked cauldrons sit near a floating ghost. As the camera ascends a short flight of stairs and passes through a rusted iron gate, it enters a circular tower and begins a tight spiral descent through rough-hewn stone walls. The scene finally opens into a lower-level corridor where the warm torchlight shifts dramatically to a cool blue-green glow, moving between ornate gothic columns toward a distant archway.
